nasb.text: For one will hardly die for a righteous man; though perhaps for the good man someone would dare even to die.

esv.text: For one will scarcely die for a righteous person—though perhaps for a good person one would dare even to die—

cnv.text: 為義人死，是少有的；為好人死，或有敢作的；

ccb.text: 为义人死，是罕见的；为好人死，也许有敢做的；

csbs.text: 为义人死，是少有的；为好人死，或许有敢做的；
